name: pr_cep_pn_churn_upd_promote
drl:
rule TJ0 when $a : E1() $b : E1(this finishes $a) then end
rule TJ1 salience 7 when $a : E2() $b : E1(this after[0ms,150ms] $a) then end
rule CH2 when $a : E0() $b : E1(this before[0ms,50ms] $a) $c : E2(this before[0ms,50ms] $b) then end
rule W3 when accumulate( E0(tag == "y", $t : ts) over window:time(200ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
rule J4 when $e : E1($t : tag) then insertLogical(new D($t)); end
rule RD5 salience 4 when D() then end
rule ND6 salience 4 when not D() P() then end
rule G7 salience 17 when P(v == 2) then insert(new P3(3)); end
rule C8 salience 5 when P3() then end
_finding: D-158 plain-not order: a single-blocker TMS churn (E1 tag-update re-fire; sync WM-DELETE before queued insertLogical) transiently drains the staged P into rtm; the blocked-P update then moves it to the rtm tail; the expiry release fires reverse(rtm) = updated-P first. The cf313x4 mechanism.
